templates.title: DynamoDB Backup
templates.description: To backup your Amazon DynamoDB file data, you can use AWS Backup, a fully managed backup service that makes it easy to centralize and automate the backup of data across AWS services. AWS Backup provides you with a single place to monitor backup activity and to find and restore backups when needed. With AWS Backup, you pay only for the amount of backup storage you use and the amount of backup data you restore in the month. There is no minimum fee and there are no setup charges.

components.text:
Backup frequency
Choose how frequently you want AWS Backup to take and store snapshot backups. Backup storage pricing

Storage transition - optional
If you decide to move your Backup to cold storage - it may significantly reduce your expenses.

components.label: info alert
components.content: 'Hourly - Transition to cold storage' can not be greater than 'Hourly backup retention period'

components.label: info alert
components.content: 'Daily - Transition to cold storage' can not be greater than 'Daily backup retention period'

components.label: info alert
components.content: 'Weekly - Transition to cold storage' can not be greater than 'Weekly backup retention period'

components.label: info alert
components.content: 'Monthly - Transition to cold storage' can not be greater than 'Monthly backup retention period'
